RefutationalBot: The claim that many people binge drink in their youth and experience no negative consequences is misleading. PrebunkingBot: This claim employs a common misinformation tactic known as "Minimization," where the severity of risks is downplayed to mislead. While some may believe that binge drinking only poses a threat to certain individuals, research shows that even a single episode can have serious health consequences, including increased risk for hypertension and liver disease.
